The '''Geonosis droid foundries boardroom''' was a room located in the [[Geonosis droid factories/Legends|Geonosis droid foundries]]. It was there where [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] urged the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] and [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] to sign a treaty with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and to pledge their [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid armies]] to them.

[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] were taken to the boardroom by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] after being caught in the droid foundries. Padmé requested that Count Dooku hand over [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] to her there, but he told her they didn't recognize the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], but he would hear her plea for clemency if [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] would join their alliance. However, she refused, and they were taken away.
{{Loc-stub}}
